case_1: This study examines the effectiveness of high-flow nasal cannula therapy. HFNC has gained significant traction in recent years. Our findings highlight the importance of early intervention. HFNC represents a promising approach that merits further investigation.
case_2: Strategije: (1) Koristi aktivni glagol (aktivan glagol / active verb) umjesto pasivnih formulacija (npr. "We found" umjesto "It was found that"). (2) Fraze koje treba izbjegavati: "delve into" (zamijeni s "examine" ili "explore"); "It is worth noting" (umjesto toga navedi činjenicu izravno); "underscore" (zamijeni s "highlight" ili "show"); "pave the way" (zamijeni s "support" ili "enable"); "navigate" u metaforičkom smislu (zamijeni s "address" ili "handle"). (3) Alternative: "in order to" → "to"; "Furthermore" → "Also" ili "In addition"; "It is important to consider" → izbaci ili "We note that". Ovo nije iscrpna lista; prilagodi kontekstu.
case_3: The data show a statistically significant reduction (p=0.02, 95% CI 0.45–0.89) in 30-day mortality. The intervention effect is consistent with prior evidence and supports the use of the protocol in this population.
